title: ilex aquifolium f. arbutifolia
intro: Ilex aquifolium f. arbutifolia, also known as the Holly-leaved or Strawberry Tree Holly, is a variety of the English Holly plant, characterized by its glossy, edible leaves resembling those of the Strawberry Tree (Arbutus unedo). The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex aquifolium f. arbutifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
